name: Pegasus

text:
# Pegasus

*Large Celestial, Chaotic Good*

A winged celestial steed that serves only the worthy.

### Actions

**Hooves.** Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Radiant damage.
